mapper.select: select count(*) from visit_log where visited_at >= CURDATE()
select count(*) from user where active = true

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(visited_at, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date, COUNT(*) AS count FROM visit_log WHERE visited_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 DAY) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(visited_at, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY date ASC

SELECT w.workshop_id AS workshopId, w.name AS workshopName, COUNT(v.visit_id) AS visitWorkshopCount, w.average_rating AS workshopAverageRating FROM workshop w JOIN visit_log v ON w.workshop_id = v.workshop_id WHERE v.visited_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) GROUP BY w.workshop_id, w.name, w.average_rating ORDER BY visitWorkshopCount DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT user_id, name, email, created_at, role FROM user WHERE active = true ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT workshop_id, name, owner_id, status, approved, created_at FROM workshop ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5
